patch.descriptionTemplate: Aigis gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: After Aigis plays a card, inflict [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|turn|turns} of {Vulnerable} on all enemies. After Aigis unleashes her Exalt, her next "Defense" takes effect 3 times.
